{{Infobox character
| name = Cirian
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = four-star Titan, squad leader
| abilities = Wolf techniques, Fox techniques, Presence
| affiliations = Titans
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Cirian is a four-star [[Titan]] who serves as a squad leader. A veteran of combat, he possesses the ability to generate protective barriers fueled by his own power and can utilize specialized [[Wolf]] techniques. He is capable of manipulating energy, such as redirecting lightning bolts, and can travel instantly through the [[Way]]. Cirian has a personal connection to the world of [[Threshold]], having visited it previously and possessing distant relatives living there. Within his unit, he maintains a long-standing relationship of trust with [[Pariana]]. During a confrontation involving [[Ozriel]] and [[Gadrael]], Cirian demonstrated significant resilience, facing punishment while maintaining his resolve despite physical injury.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Cirian of the [[Titans]] is a four-star combatant who utilizes both [[Fox]] and [[Wolf]] techniques, holding two stars as a [[Fox]] and one star as a [[Wolf]]. As a squad leader possessing a [[Presence]], he holds the view that [[Ozriel]]'s actions are pure evil. Despite having distant family residing in [[Threshold]], he submitted a report that contained no mention of the location.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] is a four-star [[Titan]] and squad leader.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] views [[Ozriel]]'s actions as pure evil.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] has distant family living in [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] has a [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] is a four-star [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]]'s [[Titan]] status includes two stars as a [[Fox]] and one star as a [[Wolf]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] is a combatant who uses [[Wolf]] techniques and Fox techniques.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] identifies himself as [[Cirian]] of the [[Titans]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] submitted a report that omitted any mention of [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titans]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
